hero.name: Sherif Essam
hero.title: I build things for the web
hero.description: I’m Software engineer with +2 years of professional experience in the software industry, specializing in front-end development.

C M Cherry Consulting.title: Frontend Developer
description: Data Visualization: Engineered interactive plots using D3.js to visualize complex biological data for researchers.
Authentication: Integrated Amazon Cognito to manage secure user authentication and frontend service access.
Dynamic Forms: Developed user-friendly, dynamic forms for complex biological data input and validation.
Data Components: Built a robust, high-performance table component using TanStack Table for complex data operations.
Visual Tools: Created an interactive tool for executing biological analysis through visual diagrams using React Flow.
Testing: Implemented unit and integration tests with Vitest, significantly increasing code coverage and reliability.

Freelance.title: Freelance Developer
description: Successfully completed 3 freelance projects with 5-star client ratings.
Developed 2 marketing websites with fully functional admin panels, enabling clients to manage content, updates, and user interactions.
Built and customized a WordPress website, including layout adjustments, plugin integration, and performance improvements.
Delivered responsive, user-friendly interfaces with focus on performance and clean UI/UX.
Communicated directly with clients to gather requirements, provide updates, and ensure timely delivery.

LaFamila Egypt.title: Graphic Designer
description: Designed promotional materials, including flyers and frames, using Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator and Figma to meet client requirements.
Delivered creative visuals that increased customer engagement by 20%.

Al Zaeem Development Training.title: IT Instructor
description: Designed and delivered comprehensive training sessions in JavaScript, HTML, CSS.
Mentored and graduated over 30 students, equipping them with strong foundational programming skills.

Helix.title: Helix
Helix.description: An interactive data visualization platform for biological data analysis, featuring dynamic charts, selection tools, and real-time data processing.

Sila.title: Sila
Sila.description: A full-stack marketing website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, including a custom admin panel for managing content, events, and dynamic sections.

Bin Qirad.title: Bin Qirad
Bin Qirad.description: A full-stack business website with an admin dashboard for managing products, categories, and content, built using Next.js and Supabase.

IFTC Union.title: IFTC Union
IFTC Union.description: A responsive WordPress website built with Elementor, customized for content management, layout flexibility, and improved user experience.

reviews.name: Christopher Cherry
reviews.title: Founder at C. M. Cherry Consulting
reviews.review:
I had the pleasure of working with Sherif on the Helix platform, where he contributed as a frontend engineer during a critical phase leading up to our beta release.
Sherif consistently demonstrated strong technical skills, particularly with modern frontend technologies, and was able to translate complex requirements into clean, well-structured implementations.

reviews.name: Muntasir Al-Hussain
reviews.title: Founder of Sila
reviews.review:
Eng. Sherif is a very cooperative person. 
He handled all the revisions I requested with great professionalism and openness, and consistently provided valuable suggestions to improve quality. 
God willing, I look forward to continuing our collaboration with him.

reviews.name: Shereen Abdelaziz
reviews.title: Founder of Zad Marketing
reviews.review: Thank you very much, Eng. Sherif. I attest to his sincerity, dedication to work, professionalism, expertise, and patience.Wishing him continued success.

reviews.name: Fahad A.
reviews.title: Mostaql Client
reviews.review: A professional engineer who understands the work assigned to him and is easy to communicate with. The project was delivered with the required quality.
